title: Ottoschulzia cubensis
intro: Ottoschulzia cubensis, also known as "Cuban Bee Plant", is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and infections. The bioactive constituents of Ottoschulzia cubensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to take advantage of its health benefits.
